steps.title: Close the parenthesis
steps.content: The phrase after "stockade" opens a parenthetical definition: "(a fence." That parenthetical must be closed before the main sentence continues with "comes from estacada."

steps.title: Reject mismatched marks
steps.content: Choice A uses a dash, choice B uses a comma, and choice C uses a semicolon; none of those marks closes the opening parenthesis. The remaining choice pairs the opening parenthesis with the required closing mark. The answer is D.
